login.heroTitle: Take control of your finances with a clear and actionable view.
login.heroDescription: Check your balance, review your transactions, and manage your income and expenses from a single interface.
login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Log in to view your dashboard and transactions.

register.heroTitle: Start organizing your finances from day one.
register.heroDescription: Create your account to track transactions, understand your habits, and make better decisions with your money.
register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Fill in your details to access your personal space.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
validation.usernameMin: Username must be at least 3 characters
